title: The Crossroads
description: Learn how to make your program choose different paths with if statements.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Qubit, what if you wanted your code to do different things based on a situation?

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Like... if it's raining, stay inside, otherwise go outside?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! That's what 'conditionals' do! They let your code make decisions!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: The most basic conditional is the 'if' statement. Let me show you!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: First, let's create an energy variable. Type: energy = 15

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Good! Now we have 15 energy to work with.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's check if we have enough energy to work. We need at least 10 energy.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: The colon (:) at the end is important! It tells Python there's code coming next.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! This checks if energy is greater than 10.

phases.title: The Action
phases.description: Add code inside the if block

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now we need to add what happens when the condition is true.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: This code must be INDENTED (spaces at the start). Type:     print("Ready to work!")

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Use 4 spaces or press Tab for indentation!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Great! This line only runs if energy > 10 is true!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: So if energy was 5, this line wouldn't run?

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! The code only runs when the condition is True!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Click play to run your code. Since energy is 15, and 15 > 10 is true, you should see the message!

objectives.description: Click play to run your code

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: It worked! Your code made a decision!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: But what if the condition is false? Nothing happens?

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Good question! That's where 'else' comes in. Let's learn about that next!
